rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §37.089, which governs the role of persons carrying firearms on school grounds. No overlap in subject matter exists.
quote: Sec. 37.089. ROLE OF PERSONS CARRYING A FIREARM ON SCHOOL GROUNDS.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns school firearm policy and has no nexus to property tax homestead exemptions.
